headline: Why Deutsche Bank Still Isn’t Convinced About Intuitive Surgical (ISRG)
summary: With a short percentage of shares outstanding of 2.05%, Intuitive Surgical, Inc. (NASDAQ:ISRG) is among the 7 Best Longevity and Anti-Aging Stocks to Buy. On June 2, Deutsche Bank reduced its price target on Intuitive Surgical, Inc. (NASDAQ:ISRG) to $366 from $440 while maintaining a Sell rating on the shares. The revised target reflects the firm’s updated valuation outlook for the […]

headline: Did Leadership Shifts Amid FDA Scrutiny Just Reframe Intuitive Surgical's (ISRG) Investment Narrative?
summary: In late May, Intuitive Surgical announced leadership changes effective July 1, promoting nearly 20-year company veteran Taylor Patton to Chief Commercial and Marketing Officer while moving current CCMO Henry Charlton into a new Senior Vice President of Global Business Operations role focused on global value generation. These executive moves come as Intuitive manages FDA safety alerts, product recalls, and rising competition, all while relying on its large installed da Vinci base and...

headline: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) Stock After 28% Slide Are Valuation Expectations Reset Enough
summary: If you are wondering whether Intuitive Surgical stock is starting to offer better value or still pricing in a lot of optimism, you are not alone. The share price closed at US$406.78, with returns declining 2.3% over the past week, 7.1% over the past month, and 27.6% year to date. The return over the past 1 year is down 21.0% and the 3 and 5 year returns are 25.1% and 33.7% respectively. Recent coverage has focused on how Intuitive Surgical sits within medical technology and minimally...

headline: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) Stock Could Be 23.6% Undervalued After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) is back in focus after recent trading data showed the stock down about 7% over the past month and around 14% over the past 3 months, sharpening attention on its long term track record.
